TapeTech,Ames Bazooka Continuous Flow Corner Finishing Bundle,"## Revolutionize Your Drywall Workflow

Experience unparalleled efficiency with the TapeTech BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow Corner Finishing Bundle. Engineered for high-volume professionals, this system eliminates the downtime associated with manual reloading, allowing you to maintain a steady, uninterrupted pace across every project. By integrating a constant supply of joint compound directly to your finishing tools, this bundle transforms your output, ensuring cleaner lines and faster completion times without sacrificing precision.
## Seamless Integration for Peak Performance

Designed to bridge the gap between traditional manual taping and advanced automation, the Continuous Flow system is built for intuitive operation. If you are already familiar with standard automatic taping tools, the transition to this high-capacity setup requires minimal training, allowing your crew to hit the ground running immediately. This system is the ultimate upgrade for contractors looking to maximize their daily square footage while reducing physical fatigue.
## Key Features
- **Continuous Compound Delivery:** Eliminates the need for frequent manual pump reloading, keeping your tools active on the wall for longer durations.
- **Optimized Workflow:** Dramatically reduces project timelines by maintaining a constant, reliable flow of compound to your finishing attachments.
- **Professional-Grade Reliability:** Built with the rugged durability TapeTech is known for, ensuring consistent performance in demanding job site conditions.
- **Low Learning Curve:** Designed for seamless adoption by experienced automatic taping tool operators.
- **Enhanced Productivity:** Maximizes efficiency by minimizing the stop-and-start cycles inherent in conventional drywall finishing methods.
## Technical Specifications

column1: TapeTech,"TapeTech 12"" EasyClean Finishing Box","## Master Professional Drywall Finishing

Achieve flawless, high-production results with the TapeTech 12"" EasyClean Finishing Box. Engineered for efficiency, this tool streamlines the drywall finishing process by simultaneously dispensing the precise volume of joint compound and feathering edges on both flat and butt joints. Whether you are tackling walls or ceilings, this box ensures a consistent, professional-grade finish in a single pass, significantly reducing manual labor and rework.
## Precision Control and Versatility

Designed for the demands of professional contractors, the EasyClean system features an intuitive crown adjustment dial. This allows for seamless transitions between the initial embedding coat and subsequent finishing layers, ensuring the perfect amount of compound is applied every time. Furthermore, the integrated pivoting axle automatically compensates for uneven drywall surfaces, maintaining optimal contact and a smooth, level finish even when one side of the joint sits higher than the other.
## Key Features
- **EasyRoll™ Wheel System:** Integrated wheels allow for rapid finishing of outside corner beads—up to twice as fast as manual methods—without requiring additional attachments.
- **Universal Compatibility:** The EasyRoll system is compatible with metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose corner beads, providing a stable, guided path for the finishing blade.
- **Superior Alignment:** Engineered to align perfectly with the finishing blade, these wheels eliminate the need to tilt the box, ensuring a clean, uniform application.
- **Enhanced Stability:** The wide-shoulder wheel design provides superior tracking, making it easier to maintain the box on the corner bead throughout the entire pass.
- **Multi-Functional Performance:** Ideal for embedding tape and applying final coats on both flat and butt joints, maximizing versatility on the job site.
## Technical Specifications

column3: Flat joints, butt joints, outside corner beads
Metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose beads

TapeTech,TapeTech EasyClean Loading Pump,## Elevate Your Finishing Efficiency

column1: Experience the gold standard in drywall tool maintenance with the TapeTech EasyClean Loading Pump. Engineered for the rigorous demands of professional contractors, this pump streamlines your workflow by providing a consistent, high-volume delivery system for your finishing tools. By integrating advanced sealing technology and a refined structural design, the 76TT minimizes downtime and maximizes output on every job site.
## Precision Engineering for Professionals

The 76TT model replaces traditional, cumbersome maintenance requirements with a streamlined, user-friendly interface. The standout innovation is the integrated O-Ring system, which eliminates the need for unreliable paper gaskets. This ensures a leak-proof connection for your filler adapters and goosenecks, preventing messy blowouts and reducing the frustration of replacing lost or degraded components. With its slim-profile tube and reinforced construction, this pump is built to withstand the daily wear and tear of professional drywall finishing.
## Key Features
- **Integrated O-Ring Seal:** Eliminates the need for paper gaskets, ensuring a secure, airtight connection that is easier to maintain and less prone to failure.
- **Twist-Lock Foot Valve:** Allows for rapid attachment and detachment, simplifying the cleaning process and reducing time spent on tool maintenance.
- **Slim Tube Profile:** Designed for optimal ergonomics and portability, making it the preferred choice for finishers who value efficiency and ease of handling.
- **Versatile Compatibility:** Fully compatible with standard 85T goosenecks for automatic tapers and 90T filler adapters for finishing boxes, MudRunners, corner applicators, and nail spotters.
- **Robust Construction:** Engineered for long-term durability, ensuring consistent performance even in high-volume, demanding environments.
## Technical Specifications

,TTT76TT,,The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation.

column1: TapeTech,TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Taper,"## Elevate Your Drywall Finishing Efficiency

The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper is engineered for the professional finisher who demands uncompromising precision and speed. By simultaneously applying joint compound and tape to both flat and butt joints, this tool drastically reduces labor time on walls and ceilings. Designed with a focus on durability and user comfort, it stands as the industry benchmark for high-performance drywall application.
## Precision Engineering for Demanding Jobsites

Built to withstand the rigors of daily professional use, the 07TT features premium stainless steel side plates and a hard-anodized push rod and cable drum to resist corrosion and ensure longevity. The tool’s maintenance-friendly design, highlighted by the EasyClean® cover plate, allows for rapid disassembly with a simple quarter-turn, ensuring you spend less time cleaning and more time finishing. With an ergonomic control tube featuring enclosed rollers, you can enjoy a secure, pinch-free grip throughout the workday.
## Key Features
- **Dual-Action Application:** Simultaneously dispenses tape and joint compound for seamless coverage on flat joints, butt joints, and internal corners.
- **EasyClean® Technology:** Quick-access cover plate allows for effortless cleaning and maintenance without the need for specialized tools.
- **Professional-Grade Durability:** Constructed with stainless steel side plates and hard-anodized components to prevent wear and corrosion.
- **Ergonomic Control:** Features a smaller diameter tube protector and enclosed rollers to maximize comfort and prevent hand pinching.
- **Jobsite Convenience:** Integrated hook on the spool keeper allows for secure storage on framing or scaffolding when not in use.
- **Customizable Tension:** Adjustable brake system provides precise control over main wheel tension to suit your specific application style.
## Technical Specifications

column1: TapeTech,TapeTech Inside Corner Roller w/o Handle,"## Achieve Flawless Internal Corners with Precision Engineering

Elevate your drywall finishing process with the TapeTech Inside Corner Roller. Designed for professionals who demand efficiency and consistency, this tool is engineered to seamlessly embed joint tape into internal wall and ceiling corners. By applying uniform pressure, it ensures a secure bond and prepares the surface for a perfect finish, significantly reducing the time spent on manual adjustments.
## Optimized for Professional Performance

This robust roller is the essential bridge between your automatic taper and your corner finisher. By effectively displacing excess joint compound from behind the tape, it creates a clean, uniform foundation that allows your finishing tools to glide effortlessly. Built to withstand the rigors of high-volume job sites, the TapeTech Inside Corner Roller is a must-have for contractors looking to achieve crisp, professional-grade results on every project.
## Key Features
- **Precision Embedding:** Quickly and accurately seats joint tape into internal corners for a durable, bubble-free finish.
- **Compound Management:** Efficiently forces out excess joint compound, creating the ideal surface profile for subsequent corner finishing tools.
- **Durable Construction:** Equipped with high-grade stainless steel rollers that resist corrosion and maintain their shape for long-term reliability.
- **Versatile Application:** Perfectly suited for both wall and ceiling internal corners, ensuring consistent quality across all orientations.
- **Workflow Integration:** Designed to work seamlessly with automatic tapers and corner finishers to streamline your drywall finishing system.
## Technical Specifications

TapeTech,TapeTech Bazooka Oil Aerosol Spray 8oz,## Protect Your Investment with Precision Lubrication

column1: Ensure your Automatic Taping and Finishing (ATF) tools perform at their peak with TapeTech Bazooka Oil. Engineered specifically for the rigorous demands of professional drywall finishing, this specialized aerosol lubricant provides a critical moisture barrier that shields internal components from rust and corrosion. By maintaining smooth, friction-free operation, this formula helps you achieve consistent results while significantly extending the service life of your equipment.
## Why Choose Specialized Lubrication?

Standard solvent-based lubricants, such as WD-40, can cause irreversible degradation to the delicate rubber gaskets, wipers, and O-rings found in your taping tools. TapeTech Bazooka Oil is chemically engineered to be compatible with these sensitive materials, ensuring your tools remain sealed and operational without the risk of premature component failure. Whether you are maintaining a TapeTech Automatic Taper, a Mud Runner, or other high-performance ATF systems, this oil is the industry-standard choice for reliability.
## Key Features
- **Corrosion Defense:** Creates a robust water-repellent barrier that prevents oxidation and rust on critical metal parts.
- **Seal Compatibility:** Specifically formulated to be safe for use with rubber gaskets, O-rings, and wipers, preventing swelling or cracking.
- **Optimized Performance:** Reduces internal friction to ensure smooth, effortless operation during high-volume taping jobs.
- **Professional Grade:** The preferred maintenance solution for TapeTech Automatic Tapers, Mud Runners, and a wide range of ATF finishing tools.
- **Easy Application:** Convenient aerosol spray format allows for precise, mess-free application to hard-to-reach internal mechanisms.
## Technical Specifications

,TTT056707,,Specially formulated for lubricating Automatic Taping and Finishing Tools.

- **Optimized Compatibility:** Specifically engineered to integrate with TapeTech 72TT, 73TT, and 76TT loading pumps for versatile application.
- **Enhanced Stability:** Features a built-in foot support to maintain balance and prevent tipping during the filling process.

column1: TapeTech,"TapeTech 2"" Angle Head Drywall Corner Finisher - 40XTT","## Achieve Flawless Internal Corners with Precision

Elevate your drywall finishing standards with the TapeTech 2"" Angle Head Corner Finisher. Engineered for professionals who demand efficiency without compromising on quality, this tool streamlines the finishing process by simultaneously wiping and feathering both sides of an internal corner in a single, fluid motion. Designed to integrate seamlessly into your taping workflow, it is the ideal follow-up to the Corner Roller, ensuring a professional-grade finish every time.
## Superior Performance and Adaptability

The 40XTT is built to handle the realities of job-site conditions. Its sophisticated spring-loaded mechanism provides the necessary flexibility to accommodate corners that deviate slightly from a perfect 90-degree angle, ensuring consistent pressure and a uniform finish across varying wall geometries. By effectively removing excess joint compound and feathering the edges, this tool eliminates the need for tedious manual touch-ups, significantly reducing your labor time.
## Key Features
- **Dual-Sided Efficiency:** Simultaneously wipes and feathers both sides of an internal corner, doubling your productivity in one pass.
- **Adaptive Spring Action:** Automatically adjusts to variations in corner angles, ensuring a tight, clean seal even when walls are not perfectly square.
- **Professional Feathering:** Precision-engineered blade geometry creates a smooth, seamless transition that is ready for sanding or final coating.
- **Workflow Integration:** Specifically designed to work in tandem with TapeTech Corner Rollers for a complete, high-performance taping system.
- **Durable Construction:** Built to withstand the rigorous demands of daily professional use, maintaining its shape and performance over time.

column1: TapeTech,TapeTech Flat Box Wheel Repair Kit,"## Restore Peak Performance to Your Finishing Boxes

Ensure your drywall finishing equipment remains in top operational condition with the TapeTech Flat Box Wheel Repair Kit. Designed specifically for professionals who demand consistency on the job site, this comprehensive maintenance set provides all the essential components required to restore smooth, reliable movement to your finishing boxes. Whether you are utilizing standard Flat, EasyClean, or Power Assist models, this kit ensures your tools glide effortlessly across joints for a flawless finish every time.
## Precision Engineering for Heavy-Duty Use

Over time, the constant friction and debris exposure inherent in drywall finishing can degrade wheel performance, leading to uneven pressure and increased operator fatigue. This kit addresses these wear points directly, replacing critical components with high-quality, durable parts that meet TapeTech’s rigorous manufacturing standards. By performing routine maintenance with these factory-spec replacements, you protect your investment and maintain the high-speed efficiency required for large-scale commercial and residential projects.
## Key Features
- **Universal Compatibility:** Engineered to fit all sizes and variations of TapeTech Finishing Boxes, including Flat, EasyClean, and Power Assist models.
- **Complete Restoration Set:** Includes a full suite of bearings, shoulder screws, brass washers, O-rings, and wheels to perform a comprehensive overhaul of the wheel assembly.
- **Enhanced Durability:** Features updated Nyliner bearings (059148) that replace older 219076 versions for improved longevity and smoother rotation.
- **Precision Components:** Includes high-grade brass washers and Buna O-rings to ensure a tight, secure fit that resists common job site wear and tear.
- **Professional Maintenance:** Simplifies the repair process, allowing you to quickly service your equipment and minimize costly downtime on the job.
